titleStmt.title: SII 41.34: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 34. (A.R. No. 33 of 1905.) Tiṇḍivaṉam, Tiṇḍivaṉam Taluk, South Arcot District.

summary.p: At the entrance into the maṇḍapa of the Lakshminarasimha Perumāḷ Temple, left side

p.hi: Vijayanagar, Sadāśivarāya, Śaka 1464, Kīlaka, Dhanus, Apara 14, Friday = 1548, December 28, Friday.

summary.p: Records the gift of a village for the merit of the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāja Chiṉṉa-Timmaiyadēva Mahārāja by Meypōkayarāya-nāyakkar. The village Veṇmaṇayāṟṟūr was within Oḻugaṟai, a māgaṇi-sīrmai of the latter.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§śrī maṉmakārāja rājaparameśvara śrīvirappiṟatāpa pūṟuvadakṣaṇapaccimauttira camu
ttirātipati śrīcatācivaṭevamakārāyar piṟitivirācciyam paṇṇiyaruḷā niṉṟa cakā
ṟttam 1000 4 100 6 10 4ṉmel cellāniṉṟa kilaka varuṣam taṉu nāyaṟṟu Amarapa
kṣattu catuṟteciyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum mūlanakṣatramum peṟṟa puṇyakālattile śrīmaṉ
makāmaṇṭaleśvararāmarācucciṉatimmaiyya tevamakārācaiyaṉukku puṇyamāka
koḷḷamey pokarāya nāyakkar nammiṭamākaṇacirmaiyāṉa Oḻukaṟaikkuḷ
veṇmaṇa yāṟṟūr tiṇṭivaṉam nāraciṅkamūrttikku tārāpūṟuvamāka kuṭuttom Atukku
tiṉam cantiviḷakku Aṉpatum rāttiri naivvettiya veḷaiyile pattu kaccāyam samarppikkatākavum yinta ni
tyapaṭi kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭu AyaṉpEṟmatimārācar Ayaṉ Avaṟkaḷukku puṇayamyātoruttar pratipālanam
paṇṇi naṭatti kaṭavarākavum . dāna pālanayormmaṣredānāśreyon pālanam dānāt sva
mavāpnotipālanādaccutampadam .
Digital edition of SII 41.34 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
